stdout:
# Marketing (reply-engagement): Text Syndicate -- reply candidate for @keitaro_aigc tweet 2076774647790706808

Per the reply-engagement growth strategy (genuine, human-reviewed replies to real accounts in Colophon's niche, not automated mass-commenting): target tweet reports a concrete technical finding about Grok Build CLI 0.2.93 sending files the model hasn't read via a Git bundle, observed sending 5.10GiB before being stopped in a 12GB test, with a 192KB conversation channel.

## Self-critique applied
- Specificity: reply names the concrete risk (unread files being transmitted, not just token cost) and asks a specific follow-up question (exclusion-pattern conventions) rather than a generic "interesting!" reaction.
- Payoff completeness: the reply itself states a real observation (the risk framing) before asking the question -- it isn't a bare question with no value added.
- Experience honesty: framed as an observation/question, not a fabricated personal test of Grok Build CLI.
- No links, no hashtags.

## Final reply text
これは実務で刺さる検証ですね。トークン消費より「読んでないファイルまで送られる」方が怖いポイントだと思っていて、リポジトリの規模によっては圧迫だけでなく思わぬ情報が渡ってしまうリスクもありそうです。除外設定、何か固まった型ってあります？

Approved by operator 2026-07-14 for real posting as a reply to https://x.com/keitaro_aigc/status/2076774647790706808.
